name: Part 0: Web Fundamentals
description: HTTP protocols, web architecture, HTML forms, and traditional vs modern web applications

name: Part 1: React Basics
description: React fundamentals, JSX, props, state, hooks, event handling, and component lifecycle

name: Part 2: Communicating with Server
description: REST APIs, HTTP requests with axios, useEffect hook, forms, and error handling

name: Part 3: Node.js and Express
description: Server-side JavaScript, Express framework, middleware, CORS, routing, and REST API design

name: Part 4: Testing and Authentication
description: JWT authentication, bcrypt password hashing, Jest testing, and security best practices

name: Part 5: React Testing
description: React Testing Library, Jest mocks, component testing, E2E testing, and testing strategies

name: Part 6: Redux and Context
description: Redux state management, reducers, actions, React Context, and state management choices
